title: The One Who Follows
description: this mod adds a terrifying 3 block tall creature he will stalk you overtime and become more active watch your back out there
body:
THIS MOD WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT GECKOLIB! 

The One Who Follows is a physiological horror mod made by MikeyMC

This mod aims to make the player feel extremely uneasy and fearful and observant The One Who Follows will stalk you be careful in forests as he could be hiding anywhere when he is near you can hear a heartbeat he will stand there staring at you then he will despawn or has he? he then reappear closer your best bet is to run the opposite direction Do Not Approach Him as this will most likely aggravate him enjoy ;) 

MOD FAQ: he has a very low spawn rate.

any support on my YouTube channel will be highly appreciated link: http://www.youtube.com/@FMike777
